topic: Repo analysis value-extraction lens — how to extract value (patterns, ideas, reusable components) from external repos (offensive lens, supplement to defensive-lens research at .research/repo-analysis-skill/RESEARCH_OUTPUT.md)
subQuestions: SQ-D1a: How do AI code-indexing tools (Greptile, Sourcegraph, Cursor, Augment) work internally?
SQ-D1b: What repo-to-text tools exist and how do they compare?
SQ-D1c: What frameworks exist for evaluating code reuse quality?
SQ-D1d: What internal capabilities already exist and what is missing?
SQ-D2a: How does the GitHub Search API work?
SQ-D2b: How do package registry search APIs work?
SQ-D2c: What curated discovery vectors exist beyond GitHub?
SQ-D2d: What web search APIs are available for repo discovery?
SQ-D3a: What heuristics predict component portability?
SQ-D3b-1: What tools support component extraction?
SQ-D3b-2: What heuristics identify good extraction candidates?
SQ-D3c: How can architectural patterns be mined automatically?
SQ-D4a: What prompting strategies work best for codebase analysis?
SQ-D4b: How do AI tools handle multi-file understanding at scale?
SQ-D4c: What can be learned from the Claude Code ecosystem?
SQ-D5: What is the internal capabilities delta for value extraction?
themesIdentified: Context Quality as Primary Performance Lever
Internal Capabilities Delta (70% exists, 30% must build)
Documentation Paradox (discovery gate vs integration difficulty)
